sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111360" key="filopaidei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλοπαιδ-εία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n111360.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">love of boys,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1073c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
